title: VillagerBestTradeUtility4Fabric
description: Make villager's best trade possible for every difficulty level
body:
This mod supports:
1. The villager will turn into the zombie villager (100%) after being attacked in any level of difficulty (for easy and normal level)
2. The zombie villager will turn into the villager instantly after interacting with the weak effect and golden apple

This mod makes villager's best trade mechanism possible in easy and normal level and improves its efficiency
